title: Breakwave Tanker Report 7.30.2024
summary:
Main
VLCC Market Sentiment Rebounds but Excitement Might Be Short Lived as Volumes Remain Subdued - The second half
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2024-07-30_breakwave-tanker-report-7-30-2024_breakwavetankersjuly302024report_11625f2120b6.pdf

BWET
Tanker Shipping
July 30, 2024
Breakwave Tanker Futures Index: 1,197 VLCC Middle East-Asia Spot Rates: $13.47 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 4.8% ↑ 30D: 11.4% Momentum: Positive
↓ YTD: -1.4% ↑ YTD: 1.8% Sentiment: Positive
↓ YOY: -11.4% ↓ YOY: -3.6% Fundamentals: Neutral
Bi-Weekly Report
• VLCC Market Sentiment Rebounds but Excitement Might Be Short Lived as Volumes Remain Subdued - The second half
of July proved to be a sharp contrast to the earlier month's weakness, with the final week bringing improved market
sentiment for the VLCC Middle East Gulf to China route and a firmer momentum in the Atlantic market. Initially, VLCC
activity in the Arabian Gulf appeared sluggish. However, a healthier tonnage list bolstered market sentiment despite the
initial lack of activity.
